.col-num { width: var(--col-num-w); text-align: right; }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    .total-row td {\n        background-color: var(--bg-total);\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n\n    .total-label        </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Location :</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{location}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">Print Date :</span>\n                <span class=\"header-value\">{print_date}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"header-right\">\n            <div class=\"header-row\">\n                <span class=\"header-label\">From :</span>\n                <span BEGIN:BLOCK_REPEAT batches -->\n    <div class=\"batch-block\">\n        <div class=\"batch-header\">\n            <div class=\"batch-info-left\">\n                <span>Recipe {batch_recipe}</span>\n                <span>Batch # {batch_number}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"batch-info-right\">\n                <span>Start {batch_start}</span>\n                <span>End {batch_end}</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <table>\n            <thead>\n                <tr>\n                    <th class=\"col-sl\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-name\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-num\" 15px;\n        margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .header-grid {\n        display: grid;\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n        gap: 0 20px;\n        margin-bottom: 15px;\n    }\n\n    .header-col {\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .header-item {\n        display: flex;\n        align-items: baseline;\n        gap: 5px;\n    }\n\n    .header-label {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        min-width: 90px;\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .header-value {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .colon {\n        margin: 0 2px;\n    }\n\n    .report-title {\n        text-align: center;\n        font-family: var(--font-title);\n        font-size: 28pt;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        margin: 0;\n        line-height: 1.2;\n    }\n\n    /* Batch Tables */\n    .batch-section {\n        margin-bottom: 25px;\n    }\n\n    table {\n        width: 100%;\n        border-collapse: collapse;\n        border: var(--border-width) solid var(--border-color);\n        table-layout: fixed;\n    }\n\n    th, td {\n        border: var(--border-width) solid var(--border-color);\n space-between;\n        width: 100%;\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n\n    .batch-info-left, .batch-info-right {\n        display: flex;\n        gap: 25px;\n    }\n\n    /* Column Headers */\n    th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        background-color: var(--header-bg);\n        text-align: center;\n        padding: 6px 4px;\n    }\n\n    /* Column Widths */\n    th.col-sl { width: 8%; }\n td.text-center { text-align: center; }\n    td.text-left { text-align: left; padding-left: 8px; }\n    td.text-right { text-align: right; padding-right: 8px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    .total-row td {\n        background-color: var(--total-bg);\n        font-weight: bold;\n        border-top: var(--border-thick) solid var(--border-color);\n    }\n\n    .total-label {\n        text-align: left;\n        padding-left: 8px;\n    }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"page-container\">\n\n    <!-- Header Section -->\n    <div The LLM needs to ensure the mapping key matches the actual table identifier used in the schema.\n    *   *Row vs Header Tokens:* Tokens might represent headers (column names) or data rows. Confusing these leads to wrong extraction.\n    *   *Total Aggregation:* Totals are often calculated fields, not raw data. The LLM needs to distinguish between source data tokens and derived total tokens."

```json
    }
```

```json
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis report generates a detailed consumption analysis for manufacturing batches, comparing set weights against actual weights for materials dispensed across multiple bins. The data is sourced from the `recipes` table, where each row represents a batch containing up to 12 material bins. The report unpivots these bin columns into a vertical list of materials per batch, calculates weight errors, and aggregates totals per batch.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Report metadata (Plant, Location, Dates, Recipe Code) and Batch Header info (Batch No, Start/End times).\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sequence number, Material Name, Set Weight (kg), Actual Weight (kg), Error (kg), Error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Sum of Set, Actual, and Error weights; Average Error % for the batch.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `plant_name` | `PARAM:plant_name` | Parameter |\\n| `location` | `PARAM:location` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `PARAM:print_date` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date` | `PARAM:from_date` | Parameter |\\n| `to_date` | `PARAM:to_date` | Parameter |\\n| `recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Column |\\n| `batch_recipe` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Column |\\n| `batch_no` | `recipes.id` | Column |\\n| `batch_start` | `recipes.start_time` | Column |\\n| `batch_end` | `recipes.end_time` | Column |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED` | Row Index |\\n| `row_material_name` | `MELT` (bin_content) | Reshaped |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `MELT` (bin_sp) | Reshaped |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `MELT` (bin_act) | Reshaped |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `COMPUTED` (Subtract) | Derived |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `COMPUTED` (Divide * 100) | Derived |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` (Parent: `recipes`, Child: `recipes`) to support reshaping within the same entity context.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` are used for filtering and display.\\n- **Filters**: `from_date` and `to_date` are passed as parameters to filter the `recipes` table by `start_time`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (MELT)**: Unpivot `bin1_content`...`bin12_content` into `row_material_name`. Simultaneously unpivot `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` into `row_set_wt_kg` and `bin1_act`...`bin12_act` into `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n2. **Row Computed**: \\n   - `row_error_kg` = `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg`.\\n   - `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100.\\n3. **Totals**: Sum of weights and calculated average percentage error per batch.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`: Contextual metadata.\\n- `from_date`, `to_date`: Date range filters for batch selection.\\n- `recipe_code`: Filter for specific recipe (optional in logic, used in header).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata and batch identification details.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"plant_name\",\n          \"location\",\n          \"print_date\",\n          \"from_date\",\n          \"to_date\",\n          \"recipe_code\",\n          \"report_title\",\n          \"batch_recipe\",\n          \"batch_no\",\n          \"batch_start\",\n          \"batch_end\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Line items for each material bin within a batch, showing set vs actual weights.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"row_sl_no\",\n          \"row_material_name\",\n          \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"row_error_pct\"\n        ],\n        \"grouping\": [\n          \"batch_no\"\n        ],\n        \"ordering\": [\n          \"row_sl_no\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated weight and error metrics for the current batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_error_kg\",\n          \"total_error_pct\"\n        ]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `from_date` and `to_date` act as filters on the `recipes.start_time` column. All other parameters are passthroughs for display. Row tokens are derived via melting bin columns and arithmetic operations.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [\n        {\n          \"name\": \"plant_name\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"location\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"print_date\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"from_date\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"to_date\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        }\n      ],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\n          \"name\": \"recipe_code\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Melt bin1_content to bin12_content into 'row_material_name'\",\n      \"Melt bin1_sp to bin12_sp into 'row_set_wt_kg'\",\n      \"Melt bin1_act to bin12_act into 'row_ach_wt_kg'\",\n      \"Calculate row_error_kg as (row_ach_wt_kg -         "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data pipeline for a Manufacturing Consumption Report. The report aggregates material usage across 12 bins per recipe, calculating set weights, actual weights, and the resulting error (variance) in both absolute (Kg) and percentage terms. The data is unpivoted from a wide format (bin1..bin12) to a long format (Material, Set, Actual) to facilitate row-by-row analysis.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date` (Header metadata and date filters).\\n- **Row Tokens**: `row_sl_no` (Sequence), `row_material_name` (Material ID), `row_set_wt_kg` (Target), `row_ach_wt_kg` (Actual), `row_error_kg` (Variance), `row_error_pct` (Variance %).\\n- **Totals**: Aggregates for Set, Actual, Error (Kg), and Error (%).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type | Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `print_date` | `PARAM:print_date` | Parameter | Passthrough |\\n| `from_date` | `PARAM:from_date` | Parameter | Filter (Date) |\\n| `to_date` | `PARAM:to_date` | Parameter | Filter (Date) |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED` | Generated | Row Number (1, 2, 3...) |\\n| `row_material_name` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot | `recipes.bin[1-12]_content` |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot | `recipes.bin[1-12]_sp` |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `RESHAPE` | Unpivot | `recipes.bin[1-12]_act` |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `COMPUTED` | Derived | `row_ach_wt_kg - row_set_wt_kg` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `COMPUTED` | Derived | `(row_error_kg / row_set_wt_kg) * 100` |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (Parent/Child are identical) to support the melt operation without external joins.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` is the primary timestamp for filtering.\\n- **Filters**: `from_date` and `to_date` are mandatory parameters for date range selection.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Melt (Unpivot)**: Convert 12 pairs of columns (`binX_content`, `binX_sp`, `binX_act`) into 3 long columns (`bin_content`, `bin_sp`, `bin_act`).\\n2. **Row Numbering**: Generate a sequential index (`row_sl_no`).\\n3. **Arithmetic**: Compute error and error percentage per row.\\n4. **Formatting**: Format dates as `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS` and numbers to 2 decimal places.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- `print_date`: String (Header display)\\n- `from_date`: Date (Filter start)\\n- `to_date`: Date (Filter end)\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including print date and date range.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed consumption records per material per recipe.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate sums and average error percentage.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `from_date` and `to_date` act as filters on the `recipes.start_time` column. `print_date` is a display-only parameter. Row tokens are derived from a wide-to-long transformation of the `recipes` table.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [\n        {\"name\": \"from_date\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"to_date\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\"name\": \"print_date\", \"type\": \"string\"}\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Unpivot 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into a single material row.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error as Actual minus Set.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error percentage as (Error / Set) * 100.\",\n      \"Generate sequential row numbers.\",\n      \"Format timestamps and numeric values for display.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\"],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n      \"totals\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"print_date\": \"PARAM:print_date\",\n      \"from_date\": \"PARAM:from_date\",\n      \"to_date\": \"PARAM:to_date\",\n      \"row_sl_no\": \"COMPUTED\",\n      \"row_material_name\": \"RESHAPE:bin_content\",\n      \"row_set_wt_kg\": \"RESHAPE:bin_sp\",\n      \"row_ach_wt_kg\": \"RESHAPE:bin_act\",\n      \"row_error_kg\": \"COMPUTED\",\n      \"row_error_pct\": \"COMPUTED\",\n      \"total_set_wt_kg\": \"AGGREGATE\",\n      \"total_ach_wt_kg\": \"AGGREGATE\",\n      \"total_error_kg\": \"AGGREGATE\",\n      \"total_error_pct\": \"AGGREGATE\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"rowid\",\n      \"child_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"child_key\": \"rowid\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"recipes\": \"start_time\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"from_date\": \"recipes.start_time\",\n        \"to_date\": \"recipes.start_time\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [\n      {\n        \"purpose\": \"Unpivot 12 bin columns into material rows\",\n        \"strategy\": \"MELT\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          {\n            \"as\": \"row_material_name\",\n            \"from\": [\n              \"recipes.bin1_content\",\n              \"recipes.bin2_content\",\n              \"recipes.bin3_content\",\n              \"recipes.bin4_content\",\n              \"recipes.bin5_content\",\n \"recipes.bin1_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin2_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin3_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin4_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin5_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin6_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin7_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin8_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin9_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin10_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin11_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin12_sp\"\n            ]\n          },\n          {\n            \"as\": \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n            \"from\": [\n              \"recipes.bin1_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin2_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin3_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin4_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin5_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin6_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin7_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin8_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin9_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin10_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin11_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin12_act\"\n            ]\n          }\n        ]\n      }\n    ],\n    \"row_computed\": {\n      \"row_sl_no\": {\n        \"op\": \"row_number\",\n        \"column\": \"rowid\"\n      },\n      \"row_error_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"subtract\",\n        \"left\": \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n        \"right\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n      },\n      \"row_error_pct\": {\n        \"op\": \"multiply\",\n        \"left\": {\n          \"op\": \"divide\",\n          \"numerator\": \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"denominator\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n        },\n        \"right\": 100\n      }\n    },\n    \"totals_math\": {\n      \"total_set_wt_kg\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_set_wt_kg\"\n      },\n     <tr>\n                <th class=\"col-sl\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. It calculates weight errors (Actual - Set) and percentage errors, then aggregates totals at the bottom.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `report_title`, `plant_name`, `location`, `recipe_code`.\\n- **Row Tokens**: `row_sl_no` (index), `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`, `row_error_kg`, `row_error_pct`.\\n- **Totals**: `total_set_wt_kg`, `total_ach_wt_kg`, `total_error_kg`, `total_error_pct`.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source / Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- |\\n| `print_date` | PARAM:print_date |\\n| `from_date` | PARAM:from_date |\\n| `to_date` | PARAM:to_date |\\n| `report_title` | Constant: \\\"Consumption Report\\\" |\\n| `row_sl_no` | Computed Row Number |\\n| `row_material_name` | Reshaped from `row_error_kg` | `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100 |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (parent=child) using `recipes.rowid`.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.end_time` is available for filtering logic (mapped to `date_from`/`date_to` filters).\\n- **Filters**: `date_from` and `date_to` into 3 long columns (`bin_content`, `bin_sp`, `bin_act`).\\n2. **Row Computed**: \\n   - `row_error_kg`: Subtraction of Set from Actual.\\n   - `row_error_pct`: Division of Error by Set, multiplied by ## 2026-04-07T07:53:49+00:00Z - v3_df
```

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-bca37aefef585c73",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Mapping Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data pipeline for a **Consumption Report** that tracks material usage per recipe. The report compares **Set Point (SP)** weights against **Actual (ACT)** weights for up to 12 ingredients (bins) per recipe, calculating the absolute error and percentage error for each. The output is a single flat table where each row represents one ingredient usage event, derived by unpivoting the 12 bin columns into a long format.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalers (Header):** None explicitly defined in schema, but derived from `recipes.recipe_name`, `recipes.start_time`, and `recipes.end_time` for report context.\\n- **Row Tokens:**\\n  - `row_num`: Sequential row index (1, 2, 3...)\\n  - `material_name`: Name of the ingredient (mapped from `recipes.recipe_name` as a placeholder, or requires external mapping if bin names differ; currently mapped to `recipes.recipe_name` as per catalog constraints).\\n  - `set_wt`: Set point weight (from `recipes.binX_sp`).\\n  - `ach_wt`: Actual weight (from `recipes.binX_act`).\\n  - `error_wt`: Calculated difference (`set_wt` - `ach_wt`).\\n  - `error_pct`: Calculated percentage error (`error_wt` / `set_wt` * 100).\\n- **Totals:**\\n  - `total_set_wt`: Sum of all set weights.\\n  - `total_ach_wt`: Sum of all actual weights.\\n  - `total_error_wt`: Sum of all errors.\\n  - `total_error_pct`: Weighted average error percentage (Sum Error / Sum Set).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column(s) | Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `row_num` | `recipes.__rowid__` | Sequential index generated during reshape |\\n| `material_name` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Display name for the material (Note: Catalog lacks specific bin names, using recipe name as proxy) |\\n| `set_wt` | `recipes.bin1_sp` ... `recipes.bin12_sp` | Unpivoted set points |\\n| `ach_wt` | `recipes.bin1_act` ... `recipes.bin12_act` | Unpivoted actuals |\\n| `error_wt` | Computed | `set_wt` - `ach_wt` |\\n| `error_pct` | Computed | `(error_wt / set_wt) * 100` |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy:** Self-join (Parent = Child) as all data resides in the `recipes` table.\\n- **Date Columns:** `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` are used for filtering.\\n- **Filters:** `date_from` and `date_to` map to `recipes.start_time`.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (MELT):** Unpivot 12 pairs of columns (`binX_sp`, `binX_act`) into two columns: `set_wt` and `ach_wt`. The `material_name` is repeated for each bin row.\\n2. **Row Computation:**\\n   - `error_wt` = `set_wt` - `ach_wt`\\n   - `error_pct` = (`error_wt` / `set_wt`) * 100\\n3. **Formatting:**\\n   - Weights: 2 decimal places.\\n   - Percentages: 2 decimal places.\\n   - Timestamps: Formatted as `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** `date_from`, `date_to` (Date filters).\\n- **Optional:** None defined in schema, but `recipe_name` could be a filter if expanded.\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including recipe name and date range.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"recipe_name\", \"date_from\", \"date_to\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed consumption records for each bin per recipe.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_num\", \"material_name\", \"set_wt\", \"ach_wt\", \"error_wt\", \"error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"material_name\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_num ASC\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate totals for weights and errors across all rows.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt\", \"total_ach_wt\", \"total_error_wt\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Filters (`date_from`, `date_to`) restrict the dataset to the specified time range. All other tokens are pass-through or computed values derived directly from the `recipes` table.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [\n        {\"name\": \"date_from\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"date_to\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ],\n      \"optional\": []\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"MELT the 12 bin columns (sp and act) into a single long format with columns set_wt and ach_wt.\",\n      \"Compute error_wt as set_wt minus ach_wt.\",\n      \"Compute error_pct as (error_wt / set_wt) * 100.\",\n      \"Format all numeric columns to 2 decimal places.\",\n      \"Format timestamps to 'dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS'.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\"recipe_name\", \"date_from\", \"date_to\"],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\"row_num\", \"material_name\", \"set_wt\", \"ach_wt\", \"error_wt\", \"error_pct\"],\n      \"totals\": [\"total_set_wt\", \"total_ach_wt\", \"total_error_wt\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"recipe_name\": \"recipes.recipe_name\",\n      \"date_from\": \"recipes.start_time\",\n      \"date_to\": \"recipes.end_time\",\n      \"row_num\": \"recipes.__rowid__\",\n      \"material_name\": \"recipes.recipe_name\",\n      \"set_wt\": \"recipes.bin1_sp\",\n      \"ach_wt\": \"recipes.bin1_act\",\n      \"error_wt\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"error_pct\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_set_wt\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_ach_wt\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_error_wt\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_error_pct\": \"UNRESOLVED\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"recipes.rowid\",\n      \"child_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"child_key\": \"recipes.rowid\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"recipes\": \"start_time\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"date_from\": \"strategy\": \"MELT\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          {\n            \"as\": \"set_wt\",\n            \"from\": [\n              \"recipes.bin1_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin2_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin3_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin4_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin5_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin6_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin7_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin8_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin9_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin10_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin11_sp\",\n              \"recipes.bin12_sp\"\n            ]\n          },\n          {\n            \"as\": \"ach_wt\",\n            \"from\": [\n              \"recipes.bin1_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin2_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin3_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin4_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin5_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin6_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin7_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin8_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin9_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin10_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin11_act\",\n              \"recipes.bin12_act\"\n            ]\n          }\n        ]\n      }\n    ],\n    \"row_computed\": {\n      \"error_wt\": {\n        \"op\": \"subtract\",\n        \"left\": \"set_wt\",\n        \"right\": \"ach_wt\"\n      },\n      \"error_pct\": {\n        \"op\":      \"column\": \"set_wt\"\n      },\n      \"total_ach_wt\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"ach_wt\"\n      },\n      \"total_error_wt\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n The data is sourced from a `recipes` table where each row represents a recipe run with 12 distinct bins.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Header Scalars**: Plant name, Location, Print Date, Date Range, Report Title, Recipe Code.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sl. No., Material Name, Set Weight (kg), Actual Weight (kg), Error (kg), Error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Sum of Set Weight, Actual Weight, Error, and Error % across all bins.\\n\\n## Mapping Strategy\\nThe source table `recipes` is in a wide format (one row per recipe, 12 columns per bin type). The pipeline uses a **MELT** reshape strategy to unpivot the 12 bin columns into a long format (one row per bin per recipe).\\n- **Set Weight**: Mapped from `recipes.bin*_sp` columns.\\n- **Actual Weight**: Mapped from `recipes.bin*_act` columns.\\n- **Material Name**: Derived from `recipes.bin*_content` columns.\\n- **Row Number**: Generated sequentially within the recipe.\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (Parent = Child) using `recipes.id` as the key.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` is used for date filtering (`date_from`, `date_to`).\\n- **Formatting**: Timestamps are formatted to `dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS`. Numerics use `number(2)` precision.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape**: Melt `bin1_content`...`bin12_content`, `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp`, `bin1_act`...`bin12_act` into three columns: `material_name`, `set_wt_kg`, `ach_wt_kg`.\\n2. **Compute Error**: `row_error_kg` = `row_set_wt_kg` - `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n3. **Compute % Error**: `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100.\\n4. **Aggregates**: Sum of errors and weights for the footer totals.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `date_from`, `date_to` (filter by recipe start time).\\n- **Optional**: `plant_name`, `location`, `recipe_code` (contextual filters or passthroughs).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including plant details, date range, and recipe identification.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"report_title\", \"recipe_code\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed consumption records for each material bin within the recipe.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"recipes.id\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate sums for weights and errors across all bins in the recipe.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Date filters restrict the recipe dataset to a specific time window. /* Default right align for numbers */\n    }\n\n    #data-table th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: center;\n        background-color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    /* Specific Column Alignments */\n    .col-sl-no { text-align: center; width: 50px; }\n    .col-material { text-align: left; width: 40%; }\n    .col-set-wt { text-align: right; width: 15%; }\n    .col-ach-wt { text-align: right; width: 15%; }\n    .col-error { text-align: right; width: 12%; }\n    .col-error-pct { text-align: right; width: 13%; }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    #report-totals td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n    #report-totals td:first-child {\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"page-container\">\n    \n    <!-- Header Section -->\n    <div id=\"report-header\">\n        <div class=\"header-top\">\n            <div class=\"header-left\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span> <span class=\"header-value\">:</span></div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Location</span> <span class=\"header-value\">:</span></div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span> <span class=\"header-value\">: {print_date}</span></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-right\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">From</span> <span class=\"header-value\">Date: {from_date}</span></div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">To</span> <span class=\"header-value\">{to_date}</span></div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div class=\"header-title\">\n            {report_title}\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"recipe-code\">\n            <span class=\"header-label\">Recipe code</span> <span class=\"header-value\">:</span>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Data Table -->\n    <table id=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th class=\"col-sl-no\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                <th class=\"col-material\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                <th class=\"col-set-wt\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-ach-wt\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-error\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-error-pct\" data-label=\"error_pct\">Error %</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            <!-- Prototype Row -->\n            <tr>\n                <td class=\"col-sl-no\">{row_sl_no}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-material\">{row_material_name}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-set-wt\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-ach-wt\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-error\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-error-pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n        <tfoot>\n            <tr id=\"report-totals\">\n                <td colspan=\"2\">Total</td>\n                <td>{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tfoot>\n    </table>\n\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->\n\n<!--BEGIN_SCHEMA_JSON-->\n{\n  \"scalars\": [\n    \"print_date\",\n    \"from_date\",\n    \"to_date\",\n    \"report_title\"\n  ],\n  \"row_tokens\": [\n    \"row_sl_no\",\n    \"row_material_name\",\n    \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_error_kg\",\n    \"row_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"totals\": [\n    \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_error_kg\",\n    \"total_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"notes\": \"Header fields 'Plant name', 'Location', and 'Recipe code' are present as labels in the HTML but have no data values in the source image, so they are not included as tokens. The table uses a single prototype row structure.\"\n}\n<!--END_SCHEMA_JSON-->"
```

```json
{
```

```json
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Contract Builder Overview: Consumption Report\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping and transformation logic for a **Consumption Report** generated from the `recipes` table. The report aggregates weight data from 12 distinct bins (Set Point vs. Actual) per recipe execution into a single row per bin per recipe, calculating the absolute error and percentage error for each.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars (Header):** `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `report_title`. These define the report context and date range filters.\\n- **Row Tokens (Detail):** `row_sl_no` (Serial), `row_material_name` (Bin Content), `row_set_wt_kg` (Set Point), `row_ach_wt_kg` (Actual), `row_error_kg` (Difference), `row_error_pct` (Percentage).\\n- **Totals (Footer):** Summations of Set Weight, Actual Weight, and Error, plus a derived Total Error Percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Strategy | Source Column(s) |\\n|-------|-----------------|------------------|\\n| `print_date` | System Generated | `PARAM:print_date` (Passthrough) |\\n| `from_date` | Filter | `recipes.start_time` |\\n| `to_date` | Filter | `recipes.end_time` |\\n| `report_title` | Constant | \\\"Consumption report\\\" |\\n| `row_sl_no` | Computed | Row Number (1, 2, ...) |\\n| `row_material_name` | Reshape (Melt) | `recipes.bin1_content`...`bin12_content` |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | Reshape (Melt) | `recipes.bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | Reshape (Melt) | `recipes.bin1_act`...`bin12_act` |\\n| `row_error_kg` | Computed | `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | Computed | (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100 |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy:** Single table (`recipes`). No child table join required. Parent and Child keys are identical (`recipes.rowid`).\\n- **Date Handling:** The report filters the `recipes` table based on `start_time` (From) and `end_time` (To). The `print_date` is a user-provided parameter for the header.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Unpivot (Melt):** The wide format columns (`bin1_content` to `bin12_content`, `bin1_sp` to `bin12_sp`, `bin1_act` to `bin12_act`) are unpivoted into three vertical columns: `material_name`, `set_wt_kg`, `ach_wt_kg`. This creates one row per bin per recipe.\\n2. **Arithmetic:**\\n   - `error_kg` = `ach_wt_kg` - `set_wt_kg`\\n   - `error_pct` = (`error_kg` / `set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n3. **Aggregation:** Totals are calculated by summing the respective columns across all unpivoted rows.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** None (Date filters are optional but recommended).\\n- **Optional:** `date_from`, `date_to` (Filter range), `print_date` (Header display).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including print date, date range, and title.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"report_title\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed consumption data per bin per recipe, including set weight, actual weight, and calculated errors.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no ASC\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate sums of weights and errors, plus total error percentage.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"The `from_date` and `to_date` tokens act as filters on the `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` columns respectively. `print_date` is a passthrough parameter for display only. Row tokens are derived via a MELT operation on bin columns followed by arithmetic calculations.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\"name\": \"date_from\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"date_to\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"print_date\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Melt the 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into three vertical columns: material_name, set_wt_kg, ach_wt_kg.\",\n      \"Calculate row_error_kg as (ach_wt_kg - set_wt_kg).\",\n      \"Calculate row_error_pct as (row_error_kg / set_wt_kg) * 100.\",\n      \"Generate row_sl_no as a sequential integer starting from 1.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"report_title\"],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n      \"totals\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"print_date\": \"PARAM:print_date\",\n      \"from_date\": \"recipes.start_time\",\n      \"to_date\": \"recipes.end_time\",\n      \"report_title\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"row_sl_no\": \"COMPUTED:ROW_NUMBER\",\n      \"row_material_name\": \"RESHAPE:bin_content\",\n      \"row_set_wt_kg\": \"RESHAPE:bin_sp\",\n      \"row_ach_wt_kg\": \"RESHAPE:bin_act\",\n      \"row_error_kg\": \"COMPUTED:SUBTRACT\",\n      \"row_error_pct\": \"COMPUTED:DIVIDE\",\n      \"total_set_wt_kg\": \"AGG:SUM\",\n      \"total_ach_wt_kg\": \"AGG:SUM\",\n      \"total_error_kg\": \"AGG:SUM\",\n      \"total_error_pct\": \"AGG:DIVIDE\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"rowid\",\n      \"child_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"child_key\": \"rowid\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"recipes\": \"start_time\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"date_from\": \"recipes.start_time\",\n        \"date_to\": \"recipes.end_time\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [\n      {\n        \"purpose\": \"Unpivot 12 bin columns into material, set weight, and actual weight\",\n        \"strategy\": \"MELT\",\n        \"columns\": No.\n\"From\" is on the right side.\nThe text \"From Date: ...\" is left-aligned relative to the right block.\nSo `header-right` should have `text-align: left;` but be pushed to the right.\nOr `header-top` has `justify-content: space-between`.\nLeft block width: ~30%.\nRight block width: ~20%.\nThis puts the right block on the right.\n\n**Let's look at the \"Recipe code\" position.**\nIt is at the bottom right of the header box.\n`position: absolute; bottom: 15px; right: 20px;`\n\n**Let's look at the \"Total\" row font.**\nIt is bold.\n\n**Let's look at the table header font.**\nIt is bold.\n\n**Let's look at the column widths again.**\nSl. No, 100%.\n\n**One specific detail:**\nIn the reference, the \"Total\" row has the text \"Total\" in the first column.\nThe second column is empty.\nThe values are right-aligned.\n\n**Let's refine the HTML.**\n\n```html\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<style>\n    :root {\n        --font-main: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;\n        --border-color: #000000;\n        --page-width: 210mm;\n        --page-height: 297mm;\n        --margin: 15mm;\n    }\n\n    body {\n        margin: 0;\n        padding: 0;\n        font-family: var(--font-main);\n        background: #fff;\n        color: #000;\n        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n        print-color-adjust: exact;\n    }\n\n    @page {\n        size: A4;\n        margin: 10mm;\n    }\n\n    .container {\n        width: var(--page-width);\n        min-height: var(--page-height);\n        margin: 0 auto;\n        padding: var(--margin);\n        box-sizing: border-box;\n    }\n\n    /* Header Section */\n    #report-header {\n        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n        padding: 15px 20px;\n        margin-bottom: 15px;\n        height: 140px; /* Increased height */\n        position: relative;\n        display: flex;\n        flex-direction: column;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n    }\n\n    .header-top {\n        display: flex;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        font-size: 12pt;\n        line-height: 1.4;\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .header-left {\n        width: 40%;\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .header-right {\n        width: 30%;\n        text-align: left; /* Text inside is left aligned */\n    }\n\n    .header-label {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n\n    #report-title {\n        position: absolute;\n        top: 50%;\n        left: 50%;\n        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n        font-size: 32pt; /* Larger title */\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: center;\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .recipe-code {\n        position: absolute;\n        bottom: 15px;\n        right: 20px;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        font-size: 12pt;\n    }\n\n    /* Table Section */\n    #data-table {\n        width: 100%;\n        border-collapse: collapse;\n        font-size: 11pt;\n        table-layout: fixed;\n    }\n\n    #data-table th, #data-table td {\n        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n        padding: 4px 8px;\n        text-align: right; /* Default right align for numbers */\n        vertical-align: middle;\n    }\n\n    #data-table th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: center;\n        background-color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    /* Specific Column Alignments */\n    .col-sl-no {\n        width: 6%;\n        text-align: center;\n    }\n\n    .col-material {\n        width: 39%;\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .col-set-wt {\n        width: 15%;\n        text-align: right;\n    }\n\n    .col-ach-wt {\n        width: 15%;\n        text-align: right;\n    }\n\n    .col-error {\n        width: 13%;\n        text-align: right;\n    }\n\n    .col-error-pct {\n        width: 12%;\n        text-align: right;\n    }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    #report-totals {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n    \n    #report-totals td {\n        text-align: right;\n    }\n    \n    #report-totals td:first-child {\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n    \n    #report-totals td:nth-child(2) {\n        text-align: left; /* Empty cell */\n    }\n\n    /* Data Row Prototype Styling */\n    .data-row td {\n        vertical-align: middle;\n    }\n\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"container\">\n    \n    <div id=\"report-header\">\n        <div class=\"header-top\">\n            <div class=\"header-left\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span> : {plant_name}</div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Location</span> : {location}</div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span> : {print_date}</div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"header-right\">\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">From</span> Date: {from_date}</div>\n                <div><span class=\"header-label\">To</span> {to_date}</div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n        <div id=\"report-title\">{report_title}</div>\n        <div class=\"recipe-code\"><span class=\"header-label\">Recipe code</span> : {recipe_code}</div>\n    </div>\n\n    \n    <table id=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th class=\"col-sl-no\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                <th class=\"col-material\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                <th class=\"col-set-wt\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-ach-wt\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-error\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                <th class=\"col-error-pct\" data-label=\"error_pct\">Error %</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            \n            <tr class=\"data-row\">\n                <td class=\"col-sl-no\">{row_sl_no}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-material\">{row_material_name}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-set-wt\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-ach-wt\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-error\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                <td class=\"col-error-pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n        <tfoot>\n            <tr id=\"report-totals\">\n                <td>Total</td>\n                <td></td>\n                <td>{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tfoot>\n    </table>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n```\n\n**Re-checking the \"Total\" row in reference:**\nLooking at the very bottom left of the reference image.\nThe cell containing \"Total\" is in the first is at the top.\n`#report-title` is absolute center.\n`.recipe-code` is absolute bottom right.\nThis matches.\n\n**Re-checking Fonts:**\nReference: Serif.\nMy CSS: `font-family: var(--font-main);` No.\" is centered.\n\"Material name\" is left aligned.\n\"Set. wt(Kg)\" is centered.\n\"Ach. wt(Kg)\" is centered.\n\"Error(Kg)\" is centered.\n\"Error %\" is centered.\n\nMy current CSS: `#data-table th { text-align: center; }`.\nAnd `.col-material { text-align: left; }`.\nThis overrides the default center for the material column header.\nWait, `th` has `text-align: center`.\n`.col-material` is a class on `th` and `td`.\nSo `th.col-material` will have `text-align: left`.\nThis matches the reference (Material name header is left aligned).\n\nWhat about the other headers?\n\"Set. wt(Kg)\" -> Centered.\n\"Ach. wt(Kg)\" -> Centered.\n\"Error(Kg)\" -> Centered.\n\"Error %\" -> Centered.\nMy CSS: `#data-table th { text-align: center; }`.\nAnd specific classes like `.col-set-wt` have `text-align: right`.\nThis overrides the header alignment to right!\nI need to fix this. The headers should be centered (except Material name which is left). The data cells should be right aligned.\n\n**Correction:**\nSeparate header and cell alignment.\n`th` -> Center (except Material).\n`td` -> Right (except Sl. No and Material).\n\nCurrent CSS:\n```css\n#data-table th, #data-table td {\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    padding: 4px 8px;\n    text-align: right; /* Default right align for numbers */\n}\n\n#data-table th {\n    font-weight: bold;\n    text-align: center;\n    background-color: #fff;\n}\n```\nThis sets `th` to center. Good.\nThen:\n```css\n.col-material {\n    width: 39%;\n    text-align: left;\n}\n```\nThis sets `th.col-material` and `td.col-material` to left. Good.\n\nThen:\n```css\n.col-set-wt {\n    width: 15%;\n    text-align: right;\n}\n```\nThis sets `th.col-set-wt` and `td.col-set-wt` to right.\nThis overrides the `th` center alignment.\nSo \"Set. wt(Kg)\" header will be right aligned.\nIn the reference, is \"Set. wt(Kg)\" header right aligned?\nLooking at crop 1... \"Set. wt(Kg)\" looks centered.\n\"Ach. wt(Kg)\" looks centered.\n\"Error(Kg)\" looks centered.\n\"Error %\" looks centered.\n\nSo I need to ensure headers are centered, but data cells are right aligned.\nI can use `th.col-set-wt { text-align: center; }` to override the class right-alignment for headers.\nOr I can remove `text-align: right` from the classes and apply it only to `td`.\n\nLet's adjust CSS:\n```css\n#data-table th, #data-table td {\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    padding: 4px 8px;\n}\n\n#data-table th {\n    font-weight: bold;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n#data-table td {\n    text-align: right; /* Default right align for numbers */\n}\n\n/* Specific Column Alignments */\n.col-sl-no {\n    width: 6%;\n    text-align: center; /* Sl. No is center for both th and td */\n}\n\n.col-material {\n    width: 39%;\n    text-align: left; /* Material is left for both th and td */\n}\n\n/* Numeric columns: Header Center, Data Right */\n.col-set-wt { width: 15%; }\n.col-ach-wt { width: 15%; }\n.col-error { width: 13%; }\n.col-error-pct { width: 12%; }\n\n/* Override for headers to ensure center */\n.col-set-wt th, .col-ach-wt th, .col-error th, .col-error-pct th {\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n/* Override for data to ensure right */\n.col-set-wt td, .col-ach-wt td, .col-error td, .col-error-pct td {\n    text-align: right;\n}\n```\nWait, `text-align` on the class applies to all elements with that class.\nIf I define `.col-set-wt { text-align: right; }`, it applies to `th` and `td`.\nI need to be more specific.\n\nRevised CSS strategy:\n1. Base `th`: Center.\n2. Base `td`: Right.\n3. `.col-sl-no`: Center (overrides both).\n4. `.col-material`: Left (overrides both).\n5. Numeric columns: No alignment in class, rely on base rules?\n   - Base `th` is Center. Good.\n   - Base `td` is Right. Good.\n   So I don't need specific alignment rules for numeric columns in the class, just width.\n\nLet's refine:\n```css\n#data-table th {\n    text-align: center;\n}\n#data-table td {\n    text-align: right;\n}\n\n.col-sl-no {\n    text-align: center; /* Overrides th and td */\n}\n.col-material {\n    text-align: left; /* Overrides th and td */\n}\n```\nThis is cleaner.\n\n**One final check on the \"Total\" row:**\nIn the reference, the \"Total\" label is in the first column.\nThe second column is empty.\nThe values are right aligned.\nMy HTML:\n`<td>Total</td>` (Col 1, Center alignment from class? No, \"Total\" is left aligned in reference).\n`<td></td>` (Col 2, Left alignment from class? The report transforms wide-format recipe data (12 bins per row) into a long-format table where each bin becomes a separate row. It calculates the difference between set weight and achieved weight (error) and the percentage error for each bin, then aggregates these values at the bottom.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Plant name, location, print date, date range, report title, and recipe code.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Sequential number, material name, set weight, achieved weight, error (kg), and error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Sum of set weights, achieved weights, error weights, and average error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `plant_name` | `params.plant_name` | Parameter |\\n| `location` | `params.location` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `params.print_date` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date` | `recipes.start_time` | Date Filter |\\n| `to_date` | `recipes.end_time` | Date Filter |\\n| `report_title` | `LITERAL:Consumption Report` | Constant |\\n| `recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Column |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED:ROW_NUMBER` | Computed |\\n| `row_material_name` | `recipes.bin1_content`...`bin12_content` | Reshaped |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` | Reshaped |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_act`...`bin12_act` | Reshaped |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `row_ach_wt_kg - row_set_wt_kg` | Computed |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `(row_error_kg / row_set_wt_kg) * 100` | Computed |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (parent and child are the same) using `recipes.rowid`.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` are used for filtering.\\n- **Filters**: `date_from` and `date_to` map to the start and end time columns respectively.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (MELT)**: Unpivot 12 pairs of columns (`binX_content`, `binX_sp`, `binX_act`) into three unified columns (`bin_content`, `bin_sp`, `bin_act`).\\n2. **Row Computed**:\\n   - `row_sl_no`: Generated row index (1, 2, ...).\\n   - `row_error_kg`: Subtraction of set weight from achieved weight.\\n   - `row_error_pct`: Division of error by set weight, multiplied by 100.\\n3. **Totals Math**:\\n   - Sums for weights and errors.\\n   - Average (mean) for error percentage.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`.\\n- **Optional**: `date_from`, `date_to` (for filtering by time range).\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including plant details, location, print date, date range, and recipe identifier.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"plant_name\",\n          \"location\",\n          \"print_date\",\n          \"from_date\",\n          \"to_date\",\n          \"report_title\",\n          \"recipe_code\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed consumption data per bin, showing material name, set weight, achieved weight, and calculated errors.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"row_sl_no\",\n          \"row_material_name\",\n          \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"row_error_kg\",\n          \"row_error_pct\"\n        ],\n        \"grouping\": [\n          \"row_material_name\"\n        ],\n        \"ordering\": [\n          \"row_sl_no ASC\"\n        ]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated totals for set weight, achieved weight, error weight, and average error percentage.\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n          \"total_error_kg\",\n          \"total_error_pct\"\n        ]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters like plant_name and location are passed through directly. Date filters restrict the dataset to the specified range.         \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_from\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"name\": \"date_to\",\n          \"type\": \"date\"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Melt 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into three unified columns.\",\n      \"Calculate row error as (achieved - set).\",\n      \"Calculate row error percentage as (error / set) * 100.\",\n      \"Sum weights and errors for totals.\",\n      \"Calculate mean for total error percentage.\"\n The report includes a header with dynamic date ranges and recipe details, followed by a data table and summary totals.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `report_title`, `recipe_code`.\\n- **Row Tokens**: `row_sl_no`, `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`, `row_error_kg`, `row_error_pct`.\\n- **Totals**: `total_set_wt_kg`, `total_ach_wt_kg`, `total_error_kg`, `total_error_pct`.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `print_date` | `recipes.start_time` | Formatted as DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS |\\n| `recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Direct mapping |\\n| `row_sl_no` | Computed | Row number sequence (1-based) |\\n| `row_material_name` | Reshape | Unpivot `bin1_content`...`bin12_content` |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | Reshape | Unpivot `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | Reshape | Unpivot `bin1_act`...`bin12_act` |\\n| `row_error_kg` | Computed | `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | Computed | `(row_error_kg / row_set_wt_kg) * 100` |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Self-join on `recipes` table (parent = child) to support the unpivot operation without external joins.\\n- **Date Columns**: `recipes.start_time` is the primary timestamp. Filters `date_from` and `date_to` map to this column.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Unpivot (Melt)**: Transform 12 pairs of columns (content, set_point, actual) into 3 long-format columns: `bin_content`, `bin_sp`, `bin_act`.\\n2. **Row Computation**: Calculate error in KG and percentage per row.\\n3. **Aggregation**: Sum set/actual/error weights; calculate total error percentage as ratio of total error to total set weight.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `date_from`, `date_to` (Date filters).\\n- **Optional**: None (Recipe code is derived from the data context, not a user filter in this schema).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including print date, date range, title, and recipe code.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"report_title\", \"recipe_code\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Row-level consumption data for each bin, showing material, set weight, actual weight, and calculated errors.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no ASC\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Summary aggregates for set weight, actual weight, total error, and overall error percentage.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Date filters (`date_from`, `date_to`) restrict the dataset to the specified range.         "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Mapping Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a Pandas-based Consumption Report. The report transforms a wide-format `recipes` table (containing 12 bin columns for content, set-point, and actual weight) into a normalized row-based view. Each recipe generates 12 rows, one for each bin. Calculations for error (difference between actual and set weight) and error percentage are performed per row. Totals aggregate the set weights, actual weights, and errors across all bins and recipes within the selected range.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: Plant details, date range, report title, and recipe code.\\n- **Row Tokens**: Serial number, material name, set weight, actual weight, error (kg), and error (%).\\n- **Totals**: Aggregated sums for set weight, actual weight, and error, plus the overall error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n|-------|--------|------|\\n| `plant_name` | `PARAM:plant_name` | Parameter |\\n| `location` | `PARAM:location` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `PARAM:print_date` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date` | `PARAM:from_date` | Parameter |\\n| `to_date` | `PARAM:to_date` | Parameter |\\n| `report_title` | `LITERAL:Consumption report` | Constant |\\n| `recipe_code` | `PARAM:recipe_code` | Parameter |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `recipes.id` | Column |\\n| `row_material_name` | `MELT:bin_content` | Derived |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `MELT:bin_sp` | Derived |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `MELT:bin_act` | Derived |\\n| `row_error_kg` | `COMPUTED: subtract` | Computed |\\n| `row_error_pct` | `COMPUTED: divide` | Computed |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: The report uses a single table (`recipes`). No joins are required. The parent and child are identical.\\n- **Date Filtering**: The report supports filtering by `start_time` and `end_time`. These map to `from_date` and `to_date` parameters.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (Melt)**: The 12 bin columns (`bin1_content`...`bin12_content`, `bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp`, `bin1_act`...`bin12_act`) are unpivoted into three columns: `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, and `row_ach_wt_kg`. The bin index is implicit in the row order.\\n2. **Row Computation**:\\n   - `row_error_kg` = `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg`\\n   - `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n3. **Totals**:\\n   - Sum of `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`, and `row_error_kg`.\\n   - `total_error_pct` = (`total_error_kg` / `total_set_wt_kg`) * 100.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `recipe_code`.\\n- **Optional**: None (all are required for the report context).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including plant, location, date range, and title.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"report_title\", \"recipe_code\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Normalized consumption data per bin per recipe.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"row_sl_no\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no ASC\", \"row_material_name ASC\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregated consumption metrics across all rows.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `from_date` and `to_date` act as filters on the `start_time` column. All other parameters are passthroughs for display. {\"name\": \"recipe_code\", \"type\": \"string\"}\n      ],\n      \"optional\": []\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Unpivot 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into row-based material, set_weight, and actual_weight.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error as actual minus set weight.\",\n      \"Calculate row-level error percentage as (error / set_weight) * 100.\",\n      \"Aggregate totals for set weight, actual weight, and error.\",\n      \"Calculate total error percentage as (total_error / total_set_weight) * 100.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n The report aggregates material consumption data (Set Weight vs. Actual Weight) for a specific recipe. It calculates errors and error percentages for each material bin and provides a summary total. The output format is a tabular report with a header containing metadata (Plant, Location, Dates, Recipe Code) and a footer containing totals.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `report_title`, `recipe_code`.\\n- **Row Tokens**: `row_sl_no`, `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, `row_ach_wt_kg`, `row_error_kg`, `row_error_pct`.\\n- **Totals**: `total_set_wt_kg`, `total_ach_wt_kg`, `total_error_kg`, `total_error_pct`.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source Column | Logic |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| `recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Direct mapping |\\n| `from_date` | `recipes.start_time` | Formatted timestamp |\\n| `to_date` | `recipes.end_time` | Formatted timestamp |\\n| `row_material_name` | `recipes.binX_content` | Melted from bin content columns |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `recipes.binX_sp` | Melted from set point columns |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `recipes.binX_act` | Melted from actual columns |\\n| `row_error_kg` | Computed | `set_wt` - `ach_wt` |\\n| `row_error_pct` | Computed | `(error / set_wt) * 100` |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join**: Single table `recipes`. Parent and Child are the same.\\n- **Date Columns**: `start_time` and `end_time` are used for filtering and header display.\\n- **Filters**: `date_from` and `date_to` map to `start_time` and `end_time` respectively.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Melt/Unpivot**: The `recipes` table has wide columns for bins 1-12 (`bin1_content`, `bin1_sp`, `bin1_act`, etc.). These must be unpivoted into a single row per material per recipe.\\n2. **Row Computation**: \\n   - `row_error_kg` = `row_set_wt_kg` - `row_ach_wt_kg`\\n   - `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n3. **Aggregation**: Totals are calculated by summing the computed columns across all rows for the recipe.\\n4. **Formatting**: Dates are formatted as `DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS`. ## 2026-04-07T18:03:00+00:00Z - v3_df
```

```json
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-a146d461d40209f8",
  "model": "Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B-FP8",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "{\n  \"overview_md\": \"# Consumption Report Contract\\n\\n## Executive Summary\\nThis contract defines the data mapping for a **Consumption Report** detailing batch-level material weighing. The report compares set weights against actual weights for multiple ingredients (bins) within a recipe batch, calculating absolute and percentage errors. The data source is the `recipes` table, which stores batch definitions and results in a wide format (bin1, bin2, ... bin12). The pipeline unpivots these wide columns into a normalized row format for display.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Header (Scalars):** Plant name, location, print date, date range (from/to), recipe code. Most are resolved to constants or parameters based on the HTML template context.\\n- **Rows:** Sequential number, material name, set weight (kg), actual weight (kg), error (kg), error (%).\\n- **Totals:** Sum of set weights, actual weights, errors, and the aggregate error percentage.\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n|-------|--------|------|\\n| `recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Direct |\\n| `row_material_name` | `recipes.bin1_content`...`bin12_content` | Reshape (Melt) |\\n| `row_set_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_sp`...`bin12_sp` | Reshape (Melt) |\\n| `row_ach_wt_kg` | `recipes.bin1_act`...`bin12_act` | Reshape (Melt) |\\n| `row_error_kg` | Computed (`ach` - `set`) | Row Computed |\\n| `row_error_pct` | Computed (`error` / `set` * 100) | Row Computed |\\n| `plant_name`, `location` | `PARAM:plant_name`, `PARAM:location` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date`, `to_date` | `PARAM:from_date`, `PARAM:to_date` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `PARAM:print_date` | Parameter |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join:** Single table `recipes` (self-join logic not required as all data is in one row per batch). Parent and child keys are `recipes.id`.\\n- **Date Columns:** `recipes.start_time` and `recipes.end_time` are used for filtering. The `print_date` is a parameter.\\n- **Formatting:** Timestamps in the header (if mapped) would use `format_date`, but here dates are passed as parameters. Numeric columns use `number(2)` formatting.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Reshape (Melt):** The `recipes` table has 12 columns for content, set weight, and actual weight. These are melted into three columns: `row_material_name`, `row_set_wt_kg`, and `row_ach_wt_kg`.\\n2. **Row Computation:** \\n   - `row_error_kg` = `row_ach_wt_kg` - `row_set_wt_kg`\\n   - `row_error_pct` = (`row_error_kg` / `row_set_wt_kg`) * 100\\n3. **Totals:** Sums of set, actual, and error columns. The total error percentage is calculated as (Total Error / Total Set Weight) * 100.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required:** `from_date`, `to_date` (for filtering batches).\\n- **Optional:** `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `recipe_code` (though `recipe_code` is mapped to a column, the filter logic implies it might be a parameter in some contexts, but here we map it to the column for the report title).\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Static report metadata and filter parameters.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"recipe_code\", \"report_title\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Normalized list of ingredients per batch with weight comparisons.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_material_name\", \"row_set_wt_kg\", \"row_ach_wt_kg\", \"row_error_kg\", \"row_error_pct\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"recipe_code\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate weights and error metrics for the batch.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_set_wt_kg\", \"total_ach_wt_kg\", \"total_error_kg\", \"total_error_pct\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Filters (from_date, to_date) restrict the batches included. The data is sourced from the `recipes` table, with batch counts derived from the `neuract__Scale2` table via a logical join on recipe identifiers.\\n\\n## Token Inventory\\n- **Scalars**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `header_recipe_code`, `report_title`.\\n- **Row Tokens**: `row_sl_no` (computed index), `row_recipe_name`, `row_recipe_code`, `row_recipe_no`, `row_no_of_batches` (computed count).\\n- **Totals**: `total_no_of_batches` (sum of row batch counts).\\n\\n## Mapping Table\\n| Token | Source | Type |\\n|-------|--------|------|\\n| `plant_name` | `PARAM:plant_name` | Parameter |\\n| `location` | `PARAM:location` | Parameter |\\n| `print_date` | `PARAM:print_date` | Parameter |\\n| `from_date` | `PARAM:from_date` | Parameter |\\n| `to_date` | `PARAM:to_date` | Parameter |\\n| `header_recipe_code` | `PARAM:recipe_code` | Parameter |\\n| `row_recipe_name` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Column |\\n| `row_recipe_code` | `recipes.recipe_name` | Column |\\n| `row_recipe_no` | `recipes.id` | Column |\\n| `row_no_of_batches` | `COMPUTED` | Derived (Count) |\\n| `row_sl_no` | `COMPUTED` | Derived (Index) |\\n\\n## Join & Date Rules\\n- **Join Strategy**: The report logic assumes a join between `recipes` (parent) and `neuract__Scale2` (child) to count batches. The `recipes.id` is joined to `neuract__Scale2.OIL_BACTH_COUNT` (or a logical equivalent representing batch events). \\n- **Date Filtering**: `from_date` and `to_date` are applied to `neuract__Scale2.timestamp_utc` to filter relevant batch records before aggregation.\\n- **Date Columns**: `neuract__Scale2.timestamp_utc` is the primary date column.\\n\\n## Transformations\\n1. **Row Numbering**: `row_sl_no` is generated as a sequential integer (1, 2, 3...) for display.\\n2. **Batch Counting**: `row_no_of_batches` is calculated by counting the number of records in `neuract__Scale2` matching the `recipes.id` within the date range.\\n3. **Total Aggregation**: `total_no_of_batches` sums the `row_no_of_batches` values.\\n\\n## Parameters\\n- **Required**: `from_date`, `to_date`, `recipe_code`.\\n- **Optional**: `plant_name`, `location`, `print_date`.\\n\",\n  \"step5_requirements\": {\n    \"datasets\": {\n      \"header\": {\n        \"description\": \"Report metadata including plant details, location, print date, and date range filters.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"header_recipe_code\", \"report_title\"]\n      },\n      \"rows\": {\n        \"description\": \"Detailed list of recipes with their codes, IDs, and calculated batch counts for the selected period.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_recipe_name\", \"row_recipe_code\", \"row_recipe_no\", \"row_no_of_batches\"],\n        \"grouping\": [\"recipes.id\"],\n        \"ordering\": [\"row_sl_no\"]\n      },\n      \"totals\": {\n        \"description\": \"Aggregate total of batches produced across all listed recipes.\",\n        \"columns\": [\"total_no_of_batches\"]\n      }\n    },\n    \"semantics\": \"Parameters `from_date` and `to_date` act as filters on the `neuract__Scale2` table to isolate relevant batch records. `recipe_code` filters the `recipes` table. Other parameters are passthrough values for the report header.\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n      \"required\": [\n        {\"name\": \"from_date\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"to_date\", \"type\": \"date\"},\n        {\"name\": \"recipe_code\", \"type\": \"string\"}\n      ],\n      \"optional\": [\n        {\"name\": \"plant_name\", \"type\": \"string\"},\n        {\"name\": \"location\", \"type\": \"string\"},\n        {\"name\": \"print_date\", \"type\": \"date\"}\n      ]\n    },\n    \"transformations\": [\n      \"Join `recipes` with `neuract__Scale2` on recipe ID to count batches.\",\n      \"Filter `neuract__Scale2` records by `timestamp_utc` between `from_date` and `to_date`.\",\n      \"Compute `row_no_of_batches` as the count of joined `neuract__Scale2` records per recipe.\",\n      \"Generate `row_sl_no` as a sequential row index.\",\n      \"Sum `row_no_of_batches` to produce `total_no_of_batches`.\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"contract\": {\n    \"tokens\": {\n      \"scalars\": [\"plant_name\", \"location\", \"print_date\", \"from_date\", \"to_date\", \"header_recipe_code\", \"report_title\"],\n      \"row_tokens\": [\"row_sl_no\", \"row_recipe_name\", \"row_recipe_code\", \"row_recipe_no\", \"row_no_of_batches\"],\n      \"totals\": [\"total_no_of_batches\"]\n    },\n    \"mapping\": {\n      \"plant_name\": \"PARAM:plant_name\",\n      \"location\": \"PARAM:location\",\n      \"print_date\": \"PARAM:print_date\",\n      \"from_date\": \"PARAM:from_date\",\n      \"to_date\": \"PARAM:to_date\",\n      \"header_recipe_code\": \"row_recipe_no\": \"recipes.id\",\n      \"row_no_of_batches\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"row_sl_no\": \"UNRESOLVED\",\n      \"total_no_of_batches\": \"UNRESOLVED\"\n    },\n    \"unresolved\": [],\n    \"join\": {\n      \"parent_table\": \"recipes\",\n      \"parent_key\": \"id\",\n      \"child_table\": \"neuract__Scale2\",\n      \"child_key\": \"OIL_BACTH_COUNT\"\n    },\n    \"date_columns\": {\n      \"neuract__Scale2\": \"timestamp_utc\"\n    },\n    \"filters\": {\n      \"optional\": {\n        \"date_from\": \"neuract__Scale2.timestamp_utc\",\n        \"date_to\": \"neuract__Scale2.timestamp_utc\",\n        \"recipe_code\": \"recipes.recipe_name\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"reshape_rules\": [\n      {\n        \"purpose\": \"Aggregate batch counts per recipe\",\n        \"strategy\": \"NONE\",\n        \"columns\": [\n          {\n            \"as\": \"row_no_of_batches\",\n            \"from\": [\"neuract__Scale2.OIL_BACTH_COUNT\"]\n          }\n        ]\n      }\n    ],\n    \"row_computed\": {\n      \"row_sl_no\": {\n        \"op\": \"row_number\",\n        \"column\": \"row_sl_no\"\n      },\n      \"row_no_of_batches\": {\n        \"op\": \"count\",\n        \"column\": \"neuract__Scale2.OIL_BACTH_COUNT\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"totals_math\": {\n      \"total_no_of_batches\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_no_of_batches\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"totals\": {\n      \"total_no_of_batches\": {\n        \"op\": \"sum\",\n        \"column\": \"row_no_of_batches\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"formatters\": {\n It occurs when trying to compare a pandas Series (or DataFrame column) with a timezone-aware dtype (in this case, `UTC+05:30`) against a `Timestamp` object that either has a different timezone or is timezone-naive.\n    *   **Root Cause:** Timezone mismatch or missing timezone information in the comparison value.\n    *   **Scenario:** Likely happening in a report generation script where data filtering or date range logic is applied (e.g., `df['date'] > some_date`).\n    *   **Solution:** Ensure both sides of the comparison have the same timezone awareness. Either convert the column to the same timezone as the timestamp, or make the timestamp timezone-aware matching the column, or convert both to UTC.\n\n3.  **Determine the Fix Action:**\n    *   The options are `refine_mapping`, `edit_template`, or `skip`.\n    *   `skip`: Not appropriate, the error prevents execution.\n    *   `refine_mapping`: Usually refers to data mapping between source and target. While related, this is more of a code/logic issue within the template or pipeline script.\n    *   `edit_template`: This seems most appropriate if the \"report template pipeline\" involves code snippets, Jinja templates, or SQL queries within the template definition that perform the comparison. However, often in these pipeline contexts, \"edit_template\" implies modifying the logic that generates the query or filters.\n    *   Actually, looking at the error, it's a Python/pandas execution error. If this is happening inside a template rendering step (like a Jinja template executing Python code), `edit_template` is the right action. If it's a data mapping configuration, `refine_mapping` might apply, but usually, timezone handling is code logic. Given the options, `edit_template` is the standard fix for logic errors within the report generation definition.\n    *   *Self-Correction:* In many report pipeline contexts (like dbt, Airflow, or custom BI tools), \"template\" refers to the query or script definition. The error is about data types during execution. The fix involves ensuring timezone consistency. I will suggest `edit_template` as it implies modifying the logic/code that performs the comparison.\n\n4.  **Draft the Fix Description:**\n    *   Identify the mismatch: The column has `UTC+05:30` timezone, but the comparison `Timestamp` likely doesn't or has a different one.\n    *   Solution: Normalize timezones. Convert the column to UTC or the timestamp to `UTC+05:30` before comparison.\n    *   Specific instruction: Update the filter logic to ensure timezone awareness matches (e.g., use `.dt.tz_convert('UTC+05:30')` on the column or localize the timestamp).\n\n5.  **Construct the JSON:**\n    *   `issue`: \"Invalid comparison between dtype=datetime64[ns, UTC+05:30] and Timestamp\"\n    *   `fix`: \"Ensure timezone consistency in date comparisons. Convert the datetime column to match the Timestamp's timezone (or vice versa) using .dt.tz_convert() or .tz_localize() before filtering.\"\n    *   `action`: \"edit_template\"\n\n6.  **Review against Constraints:**\n    *   Return JSON only.\n    *   Specific structure: `{\"fixes\": [...]}`.\n    *   Action must be one of the allowed values.\n\n7.  **Final Polish:**\n    *   Make the fix actionable.\n    *   Ensure valid JSON.\n\n    *Refining the fix text:* \"Align timezone settings in the date filter logic. Convert the pandas Series to the same timezone as the comparison Timestamp (e.g., using .dt.tz_convert('UTC+05:30')) or ensure the Timestamp is timezone-aware with the same offset.\"\n\n    *Refining the action:* `edit_template` fits best for modifying the logic within the report definition.\n\n8.  **Final Output Generation:** (Matches the thought process above).ot\n</think>\n\n{\n  \"fixes\": [\n    {\n      \"issue\": \"Invalid comparison between dtype=datetime64[ns, UTC+05:30] and Timestamp\",\n      \"fix\": \"Ensure timezone consistency in date filtering logic.
```
