       width: 100px;\n        flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .header-value {\n        flex-grow: 1;\n    }\n\n    .report-title {\n        text-align: center;\n        font-size: 24px;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        margin: 20px 0 30px 0;\n    }\n\n    table {\n        width: 100%;\n        border-collapse: collapse;\n        margin-bottom: 20px;\n        table-layout: fixed;\n    }\n\n    th, td {\n        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n        padding: 4px 6px;\n        font-size: 12px;\n    }\n\n    /* Column Widths */\n    .col-sl { width: var(--col-sl-w); text-align: center; }\n    .col-material { width: var(--col-material-w); text-align: left; }\n    .col-set { width: var(--col-set-w); text-align: right; }\n    .col-ach { width: var(--col-ach-w); text-align: right; }\n    .col-error { width: var(--col-error-w); text-align: right; }\n    .col-pct { width: var(--col-pct-w); text-align: right; }\n\n    /* Header Row inside Table */\n    .table-header-row th {\n        text-align: center;\n        font-weight: bold;\n        background-color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    /* Top Info Row inside Table */\n    .batch-info-row td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        padding: 6px;\n    }\n    \n    .batch-info-left { text-align: left; }\n    .batch-info-right { text-align: right; }\n\n    /* Total Row */\n    .total-row td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n    .total-label {\n        text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    /* Specific overrides for alignment */\n    th[data-label=\"sl_no\"] { text-align: center; }\n    th[data-label=\"material_name\"] { text-align: center; }\n    th[data-label=\"set_wt_kg\"] { text-align: center; }\n    th[data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\"] { text-align: center; }\n    th[data-label=\"error_kg\"] { text-align: center; }\n    th[data-label=\"error_pct\"] { text-align: center; }\n\n    td.row-material { text-align: left; }\n    td.row-sl { text-align: center; }\n\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n    <div class=\"header-section\">\n        <div class=\"header-left\">\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {plant_name}</span></div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Location</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {location}</span></div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {print_date}</span></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"header-right\">\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">From</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {from_date}</span></div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">To</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {to_date}</span></div>\n            <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Batch No</span><span class=\"header-value\">: {batch_no}</span></div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"report-title\">{report_title}</div>\n\n    <!-- BEGIN:BLOCK_REPEAT batches -->\n    <section class=\"batch-block\">\n        <table>\n            <!-- Batch Info Row -->\n            <tr class=\"batch-info-row\">\n                <td colspan=\"3\" class=\"batch-info-left\">{batch_id}</td>\n                <td colspan=\"2\" class=\"batch-info-right\">{batch_start}</td>\n                <td colspan=\"1\" class=\"batch-info-right\">{batch_end}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <!-- Column Headers -->\n            <thead>\n                <tr class=\"table-header-row\">\n                    <th class=\"col-sl\" data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-material\" data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-set\" data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-ach\" data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-error\" data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                    <th class=\"col-pct\" data-label=\"error_pct\">Error %</th>\n                </tr>\n            </thead>\n            <tbody>\n                <tr>\n                    <td class=\"col-sl row-sl\">1</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-material row-material\">Fish Oil</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-set row-set_wt_kg\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-ach row-ach_wt_kg\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-error row-error_kg\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-pct row-error_pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n                </tr>\n                <tr>\n                    <td class=\"col-sl row-sl\">2</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-material row-material\">Soya Oil</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-set row-set_wt_kg\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-ach row-ach_wt_kg\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-error row-error_kg\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-pct row-error_pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n                </tr>\n                <tr>\n                    <td class=\"col-sl row-sl\">3</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-material row-material\">Water</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-set row-set_wt_kg\">{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-ach row-ach_wt_kg\">{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-error row-error_kg\">{row_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-pct row-error_pct\">{row_error_pct}</td>\n                </tr>\n            </tbody>\n            <!-- Total Row -->\n            <tfoot>\n                <tr class=\"total-row\">\n                    <td colspan=\"2\" class=\"total-label\">Total for batch</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-set\">{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-ach\">{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-error\">{total_error_kg}</td>\n                    <td class=\"col-pct\">{total_error_pct}</td>\n                </tr>\n            </tfoot>\n        </table>\n    </section>\n    <!-- END:BLOCK_REPEAT -->\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->\n\n<!--BEGIN_SCHEMA_JSON-->\n{\n  \"scalars\": [\n    \"plant_name\",\n    \"location\",\n    \"print_date\",\n    \"from_date\",\n    \"to_date\",\n    \"batch_no\",\n    \"report_title\",\n    \"batch_id\",\n    \"batch_start\",\n    \"batch_end\"\n  ],\n  \"row_tokens\": [\n    \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_error_kg\",\n    \"row_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"totals\": [\n    \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_error_kg\",\n    \"total_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"notes\": \"The 'row_sl_no' and 'row_material_name' are static text in the prototype (1, 2, 3 and Fish Oil, Soya Oil, Water) as per the visual repetition in the PDF, so they are not included as variable tokens to keep the schema compact, but the structure supports them. Yes.\n\nLet's assemble the HTML.\n</think>\n\n<!--BEGIN_HTML-->\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<title>Consumption Report</title>\n<style>\n    :root {\n text-align: center;\n        height: var(--row-height);\n    }\n\n    .batch-table th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        background-color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    /* Column Widths */\n    .col-sl { width: var(--col-sl-w); }\n    .col-mat { width: var(--col-mat-w); text-align: left; }\n    .col-set { width: var(--col-set-w); }\n    .col-ach { width: var(--col-ach-w); }\n    .col-err { width: class=\"batch-section\">\n        <div class=\"batch-header\">\n            <span>{batch_id}</span>\n            <span>{batch_start}</span>\n            <span>{batch_end}</span>\n        </div>\n   .col-err { width: var(--col-err-w); }\n    .col-pct { width: var(--col-pct-w); }\n\n    .text-right { text-align: right; }\n    .text-left { text-align: left; }\n    \n    /* Total Row */\n text-align: right; } /* Ach. wt */\n    th:nth-child(5), td:nth-child(5) { width: 15%; text-align: right; } /* Error */\n    th:nth-child(6), td:nth-child(6) { width: 20%; text-align: right; } /* Error % */\n\n    th {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        text-align: center;\n        background-color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .batch-header-row td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n        padding: 6px;\n    }\n\n    .total-row td {\n        font-weight: bold;\n    }\n\n    .total-label {\n        text-align: left;\n        padding-left: 10px;\n    }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div id=\"report-header\">\n    <div class=\"header-col\">\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Plant name</span> : <span>{plant_name}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Location</span> : <span>{location}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Print Date</span> : <span>{print_date}</span></div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"header-col\" style=\"margin-left: auto;\">\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">From</span> : <span>{from_date}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">To</span> : <span>{to_date}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"header-row\"><span class=\"header-label\">Batch No</span> : <span>{batch_no}</span></div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<div id=\"report-title\">Consumption report</div>\n\n<!-- BEGIN:BLOCK_REPEAT batches -->\n<div class=\"batch-block\">\n    <table>\n        <thead>\n            <tr class=\"batch-header-row\">\n                <td colspan=\"3\">Batch # {batch_num}</td>\n                <td colspan=\"3\" style=\"text-align: right;\">Start {batch_start} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; End {batch_end}</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n                <th data-label=\"sl_no\">Sl. No.</th>\n                <th data-label=\"material_name\">Material name</th>\n                <th data-label=\"set_wt_kg\">Set. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th data-label=\"ach_wt_kg\">Ach. wt(Kg)</th>\n                <th data-label=\"error_kg\">Error(Kg)</th>\n                <th data-label=\"error_pct\">Error %</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>\n            <tr>\n                <td>{row_sl_no}</td>\n                <td>{row_material_name}</td>\n                <td>{row_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{row_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{row_error_kg}</td>\n                <td>{row_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tbody>\n        <tfoot>\n            <tr class=\"total-row\">\n                <td colspan=\"2\" class=\"total-label\">Total for batch</td>\n                <td>{total_set_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_ach_wt_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_kg}</td>\n                <td>{total_error_pct}</td>\n            </tr>\n        </tfoot>\n    </table>\n</div>\n<!-- END:BLOCK_REPEAT -->\n\n</body>\n</html>\n<!--END_HTML-->\n\n<!--BEGIN_SCHEMA_JSON-->\n{\n  \"scalars\": [\n    \"plant_name\",\n    \"location\",\n    \"print_date\",\n    \"from_date\",\n    \"to_date\",\n    \"batch_no\",\n    \"report_title\",\n    \"batch_num\",\n    \"batch_start\",\n    \"batch_end\"\n  ],\n  \"row_tokens\": [\n    \"row_sl_no\",\n    \"row_material_name\",\n    \"row_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"row_error_kg\",\n    \"row_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"totals\": [\n    \"total_set_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_ach_wt_kg\",\n    \"total_error_kg\",\n    \"total_error_pct\"\n  ],\n  \"notes\": \"The 'batch_num', 'batch_start', and 'batch_end' tokens are used within the repeating block header row. The 'row_*' tokens represent the data rows (Fish Oil, Soya Oil, Water) which repeat within each batch. The 'total_*' tokens represent the summary row at the bottom of each batch table.\"\n}\n<!--END_SCHEMA_JSON-->"
